ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_year" TEXT /* Year the movie was released */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "writer" TEXT /* Name of the writer */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Exact release date of the movie */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of production */,
  "language" TEXT /* Original language of the movie */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief synopsis of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rotten_tomatoes" (
  "rt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Rotten Tomatoes record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "critic_score" INTEGER /* Critic score from Rotten Tomatoes */,
  "user_score" REAL /* User score from Rotten Tomatoes */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews used to calculate the critic score */,
  "audience_score" REAL /* Audience score from Rotten Tomatoes */,
  "audience_rating_count" INTEGER /* Number of audience ratings */,
  "top_critic_score" INTEGER /* Score from top critics */,
  "top_critic_review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews from top critics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rotten_tomatoes_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metacritic" (
  "mc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Metacritic record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "critic_score" INTEGER /* Critic score from Metacritic */,
  "user_score" REAL /* User score from Metacritic */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews used to calculate the critic score */,
  "user_rating_count" INTEGER /* Number of user ratings */,
  "top_critic_score" INTEGER /* Score from top critics */,
  "top_critic_review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews from top critics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metacritic_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imdb" (
  "imdb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IMDB record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "user_score" REAL /* User score from IMDB */,
  "user_vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of user votes on IMDB */,
  "top_1000_user_score" REAL /* User score from the top 1000 users */,
  "top_1000_user_vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes from the top 1000 users */,
  "meta_score" INTEGER /* Metascore from IMDB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("imdb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imdb_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fandango" (
  "fandango_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Fandango record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "stars" INTEGER /* Star rating on Fandango */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Rating value on Fandango */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of user votes on Fandango */,
  "difference" REAL /* Difference between Fandango rating and other platforms */,
  "top_user_score" REAL /* Score from top users */,
  "top_user_vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes from top users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fandango_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fandango_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the movie ratings */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie ratings were accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the movie ratings */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role_permission record */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie_genre mapping */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_mapping_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES movie_genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_mapping_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the actor */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_actors_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie_actor mapping */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_actors_mapping_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_actors_mapping_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES movie_actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_directors_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie_director mapping */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_directors_mapping_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES movie_directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_directors_mapping_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Name of the writer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the writer */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the writer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the writer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_writers_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie_writer mapping */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the writer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_writers_mapping_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("writer_id") REFERENCES movie_writers ("writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_writers_mapping_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
